notes: Prediction, syntax color, and line redraw controls are preserved.
Git prompt and tab completion output is preserved.
Prompt, transient prompt, and right prompt output is preserved.
Prompt output and profile hook remain shell-owned.
Glyph and SGR-rich listing output passes through unless it contains explicit standalone fences.
fzf UI and key bindings remain shell-owned.
PSReadLine prediction rendering is byte-preserved.
Predictive suggestions use PSReadLine and remain byte-preserved.
Command-not-found suggestions are ordinary output and are preserved.
Completion output and menus remain shell-owned.
Interactive completion UI bypasses semantic rendering.
History UI bypasses rendering and profile hooks remain intact.
Directory hook and environment behavior remain shell-owned.
Environment export hook is not modified.
Completion rendering is byte-preserved.
Full-screen/cursor-addressed UI bypasses rendering.
Interactive selector bypasses rendering.
Full-screen terminal UI bypasses rendering.
Activation and environment hooks remain shell-owned.
Additional commands and formatters do not alter ptymark's stream contract.
